description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow set within a walled property featuring a spacious driveway, landscaped gardens, and a large tennis court. The main building has a flat roof with geometric patterns and expansive windows, providing a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade includes a covered entrance, a garage, and a mix of palm trees and ornamental shrubs. The backyard area is equipped with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and additional greenery, creating a luxurious recreational space. The property is surrounded by a low concrete wall, ensuring privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of architecture and landscaping.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a tennis court, and a swimming pool within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and lush landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, pool area, and the rear garden with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court, pool, and the back facade with large windows and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the tennis court and garden layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
